title: aster salicifolius var. subasper
intro: Aster salicifolius var. subasper, also known as Western mountain aster, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant's leaves and roots are rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which are believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, offering potential health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and protecting against oxidative stress. Aster salicifolius var. subasper can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies.
